title: Benchmark Run Metrics Schema
description: JSON Schema for benchmark-level metrics produced by Metadata Forge benchmarking.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark suite that was executed.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp marking when this benchmark record was created.

metrics.description: Per-library metrics collected during this benchmark run.

library.description: Dependency coordinate in the form group:artifact:version.

starting_commit.description: Git commit hash at the start of the generation workflow for this library.

ending_commit.description: Git commit hash at the end of the generation workflow for this library.

status.description: Outcome of the workflow run for this library.

input_tokens_used.description: Total LLM input tokens consumed for this library.

cached_input_tokens_used.description: Subset of input tokens served from cache when reported by the agent.

output_tokens_used.description: Total LLM output tokens consumed for this library.

iterations.description: Number of iterations performed by the strategy for this library.

cost_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD for this library run.

generated_loc.description: Lines of code generated by the agent for this library.

tested_library_loc.description: Lines of code covered within the target library during this benchmark.

code_coverage_percent.description: Code coverage percentage (0–100) for this library.

metadata_entries.description: Number of metadata entries produced for this library during the run.

original_metadata_entry_count.description: Number of metadata entries that existed for this library before the benchmark run.
